title: Christmas Light up Door Bow, Rose Gold Fabric with 25 LEDs Christmas Bow for Front Doors, Festive Indoor Outdoor Decoration, Xmas Hanging Decoration
features: 🎀 ✨ Stunning Giant Light-Up Door Bow: Make your home the highlight of the street this Christmas with this eye-catching illuminated door bow — perfect for adding festive sparkle to your entryway.
💡 Warm LED Illumination: Features 25 bright 5mm LED bulbs that emit a warm, inviting glow, creating a beautiful festive atmosphere both day and night.
🏠 Indoor & Outdoor Use: Designed for versatility — perfect for decorating front doors, walls, or interior spaces. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor displays.
🔋 Battery Operated Convenience: Powered by 2 x AA batteries (not included), giving you the flexibility to place it anywhere without worrying about plugs or cords.
🎄 Static Light Function: Comes with a steady (static) light mode, offering a consistent and elegant glow to enhance your Christmas décor.
description: Bring your home to life at Christmas with this fabulous Giant Light Up Door Bow. Be the envy of all of your neighbours. Features: Bulb Type: LED Bulb Size: 5mm Bulb Count: 25 Lead wire: 0.4m Function: static Material: fabric Indoor / Outdoor 2 xAA battery box
